Toutes les métriques CS2 expliquées avec: All CS2 metrics explained with pro thresholds and calculation method.
All CS2 metrics explained with reference thresholds and calculation method: FV Rating, K/D, HS%, KAST, ADR, Opening, Multi-Kill, Clutches, Util Damage, AWP, Flash Efficiency.
Comprendre chaque métrique utilisée par: Understand every metric FragValue uses to analyze your CS2 performance. Each stat is explained with its reference thresholds and tips to improve.
Notre indice de performance par match in: Our per-match performance index inspired by the HLTV 2.1 model. Combines KPR, DPR, KAST, Impact, and ADR to give a contextualized performance score. It's the main stat shown on every analyzed match.
Améliorer son FV Rating passe par un tra: Improving your FV Rating requires global work: increasing kills per round, reducing unnecessary deaths, and actively participating in each round (KAST). Focus on trading and positioning.
L'indice de talent global FragValue. Com: FragValue's overall talent index. Composite of 4 pillars: Performance (35pts), Consistency (28pts), Impact (25pts), Utility (15pts). A single score to evaluate a player's overall level over their last 20 matches.
Le FV Score récompense la régularité aut: FV Score rewards consistency as much as raw talent. Playing consistently, contributing with utilities, and having impact in key moments will gradually raise this score.
Le rapport kills / deaths. La stat de ba: The kills/deaths ratio. The basic FPS stat: above 1, you frag more than you die. Useful as a quick indicator, but says nothing about context: a high K/D from farming exits is worth less than a decent K/D as an entry fragger.
Seuils ELO, stats attendues par niveau,: ELO thresholds, expected stats per level, personalized roadmap if FACEIT account linked. Top EU Challengers leaderboard in real-time.
To know what to focus on first, rien de: To know what to focus on first, nothing beats a concrete analysis of your current gameplay.
Ton K/D est sous le threshold: Your K/D is below the threshold
Grind 30 min de DM + aim_botz avant chaq: Grind 30 min of DM + aim_botz before each session to stabilize your aim.
Évite les solo peek : chaque duel doit ê: Avoid solo peeks: every duel should be tradeable by a teammate.
Apprends 2-3 lineups de grenades (HE + m: Learn 2-3 grenade lineups (HE + molo) per map: +5 ADR easy.
Damage check chaque ennemi même sans le: Damage check every enemy even without the kill: damage adds up.
Ne meurs jamais isolé : assure-toi que t: Never die isolated: make sure you're tradeable on every peek.
Supporte tes coéquipiers avec des assist: Support your teammates with assists (flash, utility, trade kill).
Laisse l'entry au lurker / lineup. Suis: Leave the entry to the lurker/lineup. Follow second with trade.
Utilise une flash avant de peek un angle: Use a flash before peeking a long angle: +20% opening WR.
Ton HS% freine ta progression: Your HS% is holding back your progress
Crosshair placement : hauteur de tête su: Crosshair placement: head height on all close angles.
Spray control AK 1st mag en aim_training: AK 1st mag spray control in aim_training daily (10 min).
Ton win rate doit remonter: Your win rate needs to rise
Améliore ta communication : appelle tes: Improve your communication: call your positions in short comms.
Ne force pas les rounds eco risqués : sa: Do not force risky eco rounds: saving lets you bounce back.
Le sommet de FACEIT. Rank ELO mondial af: The peak of FACEIT. Worldwide ELO rank publicly displayed. Semi-pros, pros, top-tier streamers.
Le top 1% de la playerbase FACEIT. Des j: The top 1% of the FACEIT playerbase. Serious players who play at least 3-5 matches per week with significant time in deathmatch and aim training.
Opening win rate > 55% at this tier.
L'indice de talent global FragValue. Com: FragValue's global talent index. Composite of 4 pillars: Performance (35pts), Consistency (28pts), Impact (25pts), Utility (15pts). A single score to evaluate a player's overall level over their last 20 matches.
Un K/D qui stagne vient souvent de morts: A stagnating K/D often comes from avoidable deaths: solo peeks, 1vX retakes, useless exits. Look at your death heatmaps to identify risky zones and prioritize trades.
Pourcentage de rounds avec au moins un K: Percentage of rounds with at least one Kill, Assist, Survived, or Traded. The most reliable metric to measure overall per-round impact. A player with good KAST contributes to almost every round.
Pour améliorer le KAST, travaille le pos: To improve KAST, work on positioning and trades. Don't die alone in a useless angle. Always be in a position to be traded or survive the round.
Nombre moyen de kills par round. Plus gr: Average kills per round. More granular than K/D as it doesn't depend on the number of deaths. This stat measures the ability to consistently frag every round played.
Taux de victoire en opening duels (First: Win rate on opening duels (First Kill / (First Kill + First Death)). Measures the ability to win first engagements. This stat is crucial for entry fraggers and reveals initial positioning quality.
Améliore le timing de tes peeks et utili: Improve your peek timing and use coordination flashes. Avoid dry-peeking disadvantageous angles. Prefer team play for site entries.
Ratio d'ennemis flashés par flash lancée: Ratio of enemies flashed per flash thrown. Measures flash play quality. A flash thrown into the void is a waste of money and opportunity. This stat reveals if your flashes are truly useful in matches.
Travaille les pop flashs et les flashs d: Work on pop flashes and coordination flashes on every map. Learn flash lineups for each site and use them in teams to maximize effectiveness.
Taux de victoire sur les rounds pistol (: Win rate on pistol rounds (rounds 1 and 13). Pistol rounds represent about 15% of rounds but strongly influence the following rounds' economy. Winning pistols gives a significant advantage on the half.
Pratique les pistols en DM (USP, Glock,: Practice pistols in DM (USP, Glock, P2000). Work on headshot accuracy and pistol round team strategies. Buying kevlar or a kit can swing the round.
Mesure la régularité des performances su: Measures performance consistency over 20 matches. Based on the coefficient of variation (standard deviation / mean). A consistent player shows similar performances match after match, which builds team confidence.
La consistance vient avec une bonne hygi: Consistency comes with good game hygiene: regular warm-up, aim routines, and avoiding tilted gameplay. Focus on solid performances rather than spikes.
Dégâts moyens infligés par round. Inclut: Average damage dealt per round. Includes grenade damage. ADR is a raw measure of offensive impact per round, independent of finishing the kill. A player with high ADR strongly contributes to round wins.
Pour augmenter l'ADR, apprends les lineu: To increase ADR, learn grenade lineups on each map and use HEs and molotovs proactively. Seek contact with the opponent rather than playing passively.
Pourcentage de kills obtenus en headshot: Percentage of kills as headshots. Reflects crosshair placement and aim quality in general. A high HS% means you aim at the head by default, which shortens duels and increases your odds in exchanges.
Règle le crosshair à hauteur de tête en: Set your crosshair at head height permanently and move your mouse flat during rotations. Practice aim_botz / aim_redline maps for 10 minutes before each session. An AK spray at close range should align on the head.
Part des rounds où tu réalises au moins: Share of rounds where you get at least 2 kills (doubles, triples, quads, aces). A powerful stat: unbalanced rounds are won via multi-kills. A player with a good ratio often turns 3v5 into 3v3 or even clutch.
Les multi-kills viennent d'un bon réset: Multi-kills come from a good position reset after the first kill: re-center the mouse, wallbang/pre-aim the likely second position before repositioning. Play spots with long sight lines to chain.
Nombre de situations 1vX gagnées sur les: Number of 1vX situations won over the last 20 matches (1v1, 1v2, 1v3, 1v4, 1v5). 1v1 and 1v2 are most frequent; 1v3+ reveal the true clutcher. Each clutch is worth an entire round, often decisive in MR12.
Dans un 1vX, joue le temps : isole les a: In a 1vX, play the clock: isolate opponents, use sound, and take one duel at a time. Always keep a utility (flash, smoke) to shift the attack angle. Never dry peek when you have the timer advantage.
Dégâts moyens infligés par round avec le: Average damage dealt per round with grenades (HE, molotovs, incendiaries). Measures the offensive value of your utility game. Good util damage comes from precise HEs, molos on obvious positions, and learned lineups.
Apprends 3 lineups de HE par map (une pa: Learn 3 HE lineups per map (one per bombsite + one for rotations). Throw molotovs systematically on opposing default positions instead of waiting for intel. A well-placed grenade deals 30 to 70 damage.
Nombre moyen de kills par match obtenus: Average kills per match obtained with the AWP (or Scout). Reveals if you're the main sniper, secondary, or rifler exclusive. The AWPer profile requires a mastered economy (smart saves) and specific positioning: long sightlines, pick holes, info plays.
Travaille les peeks courts (0.3s) et les: Work on short peeks (0.3s) and quickscopes in the workshop (training_aim_csgo2). Learn the cataloged peeks of each map (CT mid Dust2, A site long, banana Inferno). The AWP rewards discipline: never dry-peek a spot where the enemy can be pre-aimed.
Comparaison des statistiques entre les c: Comparison of statistics between CT and T sides. Helps identify strengths and weaknesses by side played. A significant imbalance (more than 15% win rate gap) can indicate a side-specific problem.
Si ton côté T est faible, travaille les: If your T side is weak, work on site entries and team coordination. If your CT side is weak, review your retake positions and anchor play. Analyze lost rounds to identify patterns.

Entre ton équipe et l'adversaire : FragV: Between your team and the opponent: FragValue crosses stats of 5 players vs 5 opponents on each active pool map. You get the optimal ban sequence, the map to pick, the most favorable decider.
Leur meilleure map (7 wins sur 10), ta p: Their best map (7 wins out of 10), your weakest. Clear first-round ban.
Leur CT Anubis tourne à 68%. Ton écart e: Their CT Anubis runs at 68%. Your gap is too big to play the swing.
Ta map signature. Gap de 16pts et ton CT: Your signature map. 16pt gap and your CT Mirage at 72% vs their T at 45%.
Gap positif +9pts et leur opening WR T D: Positive +9pt gap and their opening WR T Dust2 is only 47%. Force long entries.
Proche mais leur T Inferno est un cran a: Close but their T Inferno is a notch above. Ban rather than risk it as decider.
Map où vous êtes tous les deux moyens. B: Map where you're both average. Ban to force the decider onto Vertigo.
Si le BO3 va jusqu'au bout, Vertigo est: If the BO3 goes the distance, Vertigo is the most favorable remaining map. +15pt gap.
Prep Veto arrive dans le plan Elite. Ent: Prep Veto arrives in the Elite plan. Enter the 5 FACEIT nicknames of each side, choose the format (BO1, BO3, BO5), get the ban sequence, map to pick and most favorable decider in one click. Enable your profile to be notified at launch.

Win rate par side, par map et par équipe: Win rate by side, map and team. Compare their CT Mirage vs your T Mirage to know which half to force the round.

Crée ton roster FragValue, invite tes 4: Create your FragValue roster, invite your 4 teammates and launch the veto in one click. Stats are pre-loaded from their profiles.
Entre un pseudo d'équipe FACEIT : FragVa: Enter a FACEIT team nickname: FragValue analyzes the last N matches and detects their repeated patterns. A default executes, B retakes, utility waste, plant timings, save behavior. You enter the match knowing what to expect.
A default avec smoke jungle + CT: A default with jungle + CT smoke
Dans 73% des rounds A pushés, leur IGL l: In 73% of A push rounds, their IGL throws the same jungle+CT double smoke, then palace entry with flash pop. Average plant timing: 0:48 remaining.
Stack 2 CT palace avec HE pré-grenade ti: Stack 2 CT palace with HE pre-grenade timed at 1:20. Anchor ticket with molo when smoke is called.
Si le plant est sur B tard (moins de 20s: If plant is on B late (under 20s), 4 out of 5 players systematically retake via apartments with double flash short. Never direct banana retake.
Post-plant default: 1 joueur apps avec m: Post-plant default: 1 player apps with molo lineup + 1 new box with AK ready. Ignore banana, focus apps.
Sur les 6 premiers rounds, ils dépensent: In the first 6 rounds, they spend on average 4 utility for 2 kills. 28% utility efficiency, lowest in the pool. Their catwalk smokes are 2s short on B.
Push agressif long en opening round. Hol: Aggressive long push opening round. Aggressive mid hold until their smokes are placed. Their transition is slow.
Fake B default vers A en 0:30: Fake B default to A at 0:30
Quand ils posent smoke B cave au debut d: When they place B cave smoke at round start, 55% chance they rotate A via mid/cave at 0:30. Little real B commit when cave smoke comes early.
Ne stack jamais B si smoke cave est tôt: Never stack B if cave smoke is early (before 1:45). Keep 2A + 2 mid, 1 rotating. If fake B, you have the tempo.
Sur 10 rounds T Nuke, 4 rushs outside A: In 10 T Nuke rounds, 4 outside A rushes via lower with hut + heaven smokes. If first kill goes through, they plant A lower 100% of the time.
Early info play sur outside (flash + pee: Early info play on outside (flash + peek squeaky) by 1:40. If info, molo lower + stack heaven. Their rush without info flops.
Dès qu'ils passent en 3v5 sans plant, il: Once they hit 3v5 without plant, they save 4 guns out of 5. No clutch attempts. Economy reset by the 3rd round after.
Push pour les chopper à la sortie de sit: Push to catch them at site exit once 3v5. Predictable exits: they rarely attempt a bold rotation.
Chaque setup détecté vient avec sa fréqu: Each detected setup comes with its frequency, average timing and win rate over the analysis window.
Pour chaque pattern, une contre-stratégi: For each pattern, a ready-to-apply counter-strategy: utility, positioning, peek timing.
Choisis la map du match à venir et le si: Choose the upcoming match map and the side played by the opponent: only relevant patterns appear.
Export PDF / image pour briefer l'équipe: PDF / image export to brief the team before the match. Counters readable in 30 seconds on mobile.

Les 10 niveaux FACEIT, les seuils ELO a: The 10 FACEIT levels, ELO thresholds to pass, expected stats at each tier, and concrete levers to climb faster.

Données issues de l'API officielle FACEI: Data from official FACEIT API. 1h cache.
Pour savoir quoi travailler en priorite,: To know what to focus on first, nothing beats a concrete analysis of your current gameplay.
Le sommet de FACEIT. Rank ELO mondial af: The peak of FACEIT. Worldwide ELO rank publicly displayed. Semi-pros, pros, top-tier streamers.
Le top 1% de la playerbase FACEIT. Des j: The top 1% of the FACEIT playerbase. Serious players who play at least 3-5 matches per week with significant time in deathmatch and aim training.
Les meilleurs joueurs de la population c: The best players of the classic population. Expected: very solid game sense, perfect map knowledge on at least 3 maps, automatic strat execution.
Le palier ou ton aim est déjà bon, mais: The tier where your aim is already good, but what makes the difference is decision-making and utility. You start playing against former lvl 10s in queue.
Le mid-high. Aim correct, positions appr: The mid-high tier. Decent aim, learned positions, but often tilted against smurfs or boosters. Many get stuck here for not working on utility.
Le mid pur. Decisif : commence a être co: Pure mid tier. Pivotal: starts being consistent in your performance. Solid aim, but recurring fails on tactical details.
Le low-mid. Point de bascule : tu sais s: The low-mid. Turning point: you can shoot, but you lose because you don't know where to position in anti-eco or retake.
Le niveau \"je suis pas mauvais mais je: The 'I'm not bad but I'm stuck' tier. Usually OK aim but weak game sense and zero utility usage.
Debutant-intermediaire. Sait shoot sur l: Beginner-intermediate. Can shoot static targets, struggles on moving targets and crossfires.
Debutant. Tu comprends les bases du jeu: Beginner. You understand the basics of the game but still lack repetition on mechanics.
Le point de depart. Objectif : comprendr: The starting point. Goal: understand the game, learn to shoot cleanly, don't tilt.
Comment monter au niveau suivant: How to reach the next level
ELO gagne/perdu accelere : +15 a +25 par: Accelerated ELO gain/loss: +15 to +25 per match.
Adversaires quasi exclusivement level 10: Opponents almost exclusively Challenger level 10 or high-elo level 10.

Opening win rate > 55% at this tier.
Utility spend : flashs exécutées en timi: Utility spend: flashes timed with the team, smoke lineups learned on every map.
Monte en Challenger : top 1000 FACEIT es: Climb to Challenger: top 1000 FACEIT is reshuffled in real-time, aim for HLTV rating 1.15+.
Tu dois carry les rounds eco avec des po: You must carry eco rounds with calculated aggressive positions.
Pour monter : reduis ton CV (variance de: To climb: reduce your CV (performance variance). Consistency > performance spikes.
Travaille les lineups de smokes et molot: Work on smoke and molotov lineups on at least 3 maps.
Opening duel win > 50%, sinon délègue l': Opening duel win > 50%, otherwise delegate the entry to a teammate.
Stop les solo peek. Chaque duel doit êtr: Stop the solo peeks. Every duel must be tradeable.
Route d'echauffement obligatoire : 10 mi: Required warmup routine: 10 min aim_botz + 1 DM before each session.
Apprends 2 smoke executes par map pour A: Learn 2 smoke executes per map for A and B sites.
Watch demos pros sur tes 2 maps preferee: Watch pro demos on your 2 favorite maps (30 min/week is enough).
Focus HS% a 45%+ : sort de la tranché du: Focus HS% at 45%+: get out of the average-duel tier.
Travaille la gestion d'économie (save, f: Work on economy management (save, force buy, etc.).
Un minimum de comm en micro, même en sol: A minimum of mic comms, even in solo queue.
Vise K/D > 1.05 sur 20 matchs consecutif: Target K/D > 1.05 over 20 consecutive matches to climb stably.
Arrete de peek les AWP en eco. Regarde t: Stop peeking AWPs on eco. Watch your demos.
Apprends les spots d'ancrage CT sur 2 ma: Learn CT anchor spots on 2 maps (Mirage A CT, Inferno banana).
Ne jamais dry-peek un angle large sans u: Never dry-peek a wide angle without utility.
Grind aim_botz + DM 20 min/jour pendant: Grind aim_botz + DM 20 min/day for 2 weeks: you'll climb on your own.
Spray control : AK recoil pattern doit ê: Spray control: AK recoil pattern must be perfect on 1st mag.
Vérifie ta sensi souris : la plupart des: Check your mouse sens: most lvl 4 play too fast.
Crosshair placement : mire toujours à ha: Crosshair placement: always aim at head height, hug walls.
Apprends les callouts des 2 maps que tu: Learn the callouts of the 2 maps you play most.
Installe un config avec mouse accel OFF: Install a config with mouse accel OFF + low sens (1.5-2 at 800 DPI).
Play FFA DM to get used to flicking.
Focus exclusif sur l'aim pendant 1 mois: Exclusive focus on aim for 1 month: aim_botz + DM every day.
Baisse ta sensi si elle est > 3 a 800 DP: Lower your sens if > 3 at 800 DPI.
Évite de prendre des duels longs : reste: Avoid taking long-range duels: stay mid-range.
Regarde des videos \"FACEIT tips for beg: Watch "FACEIT tips for beginners" videos on YouTube (WarOwl, TheWarOwl, etc.).
Ne te prends pas la tête sur le ELO pour: Don't worry about ELO for now.
Play to have fun and learn.
Installe une config pro classique (video: Install a classic pro config (video 1920x1080 black bars, raw input, sens 2-3 at 800 DPI).
Fais 15 min d'aim_botz avant chaque sess: Do 15 min of aim_botz before each session.
Grind 30 min de DM + aim_botz avant chaq: Grind 30 min of DM + aim_botz before each session to stabilize your aim.
Évite les solo peek : chaque duel doit ê: Avoid solo peeks: every duel should be tradeable by a teammate.
Apprends 2-3 lineups de grenades (HE + m: Learn 2-3 grenade lineups (HE + molo) per map: +5 ADR easy.
Damage check chaque ennemi même sans le: Damage check every enemy even without the kill: damage adds up.
Ne meurs jamais isole : assuré que tu es: Never die isolated: make sure you are tradeable on every peek.
Supporte tes coéquipiers avec des assist: Support your teammates with assists (flash, utility, trade kill).
Laisse l'entry au lurker / lineup. Suis: Leave the entry to the lurker/lineup. Follow second with trade.
Utilisé une flash avant de peek un angle: Use a flash before peeking a long angle: +20% opening WR.
Ton HS% freine ta progression: Your HS% is holding back your progress
Crosshair placement : hauteur de tête su: Crosshair placement: head height on all close angles.
Spray control AK 1st mag en aim_training: AK 1st mag spray control in aim_training daily (10 min).
Ton win rate doit remonter: Your win rate needs to rise

Ton FV Score global a des lacunes: Your global FV Score has gaps
Regarde le breakdown Performance/Consist: Check the Performance/Consistency/Impact breakdown in your account.
Corrige d'abord la dimension la plus fai: Fix the weakest dimension first, not the strongest.
Comprendre chaque métrique utilisée par: Understand each metric FragValue uses to analyze your CS2 performance. Each stat is explained with reference thresholds and tips to improve.
Notre indice de performance par match in: Our per-match performance index inspired by the HLTV 2.1 model. Combines KPR, DPR, KAST, Impact and ADR for a contextualized performance score. This is the main stat shown on every analyzed match.
L'indice de talent global FragValue. Com: The global FragValue talent index. Composite of 4 pillars: Performance (35pts), Consistency (28pts), Impact (25pts), Utility (15pts). A single score to assess a player's overall level over their last 20 matches.
Le rapport kills / deaths. La stat de ba: Kills / deaths ratio. The basic FPS stat: above 1, you frag more than you die. Useful as a quick indicator, but tells nothing of context: a high K/D farming exits is worth less than a decent K/D as entry fragger.
Un K/D qui stagne vient souvent de morts: A stagnant K/D often comes from avoidable deaths: solo peeks, 1vX retakes, useless exits. Check your death heatmaps to identify risky zones and prioritize trades.
Pourcentage de rounds avec au moins un K: Percentage of rounds with at least one Kill, Assist, Survived or Traded. The most reliable metric to measure overall round impact. A player with good KAST contributes to almost every round of the game.
Pour améliorer le KAST, travaille le pos: To improve KAST, work on positioning and trades. Don't die alone in a useless angle. Make sure you're always in position to be traded or to survive the round.
Nombre moyen de kills par round. Plus gr: Average kills per round. More granular than K/D as it doesn't depend on the number of deaths. This stat measures the ability to consistently get frags every round played.
Travaille ton aim sur des aimtrainers et: Work on your aim with aimtrainers and practice duels in DM. Take positions that give you the advantage and always seek round impact before dying.
Taux de victoire en opening duels (First: Opening duel win rate (First Kill / (First Kill + First Death)). Measures the ability to win first engagements. This stat is crucial for entry fraggers and reveals initial positioning quality.
Améliore le timing de tes peeks et utili: Improve your peek timing and use coordinated flashes. Avoid dry peeking disadvantageous angles. Prefer team play for site entries.
Ratio d'ennemis flashés par flash lancée: Ratio of enemies flashed per flash thrown. Measures the quality of your flash game. A flash thrown in the void is a waste of money and opportunity. This stat reveals if your flashes are truly useful in match.
Travailler les pop flashs et les flashs: Work on pop flashes and coordinated flashes on every map. Learn flash lineups for each site and use them as a team to maximize their efficiency.
Taux de victoire sur les rounds pistol (: Win rate on pistol rounds (rounds 1 and 13). Pistol rounds represent around 15% of rounds but strongly influence the economy of following rounds. Winning pistols offers a significant advantage on the half.
Pratique les pistols en DM (USP, Glock,: Practice pistols in DM (USP, Glock, P2000). Work on headshot accuracy and team pistol round strategies. Buying kevlar or a kit can swing the round.
Mesure la régularité des performances su: Measures performance consistency over 20 matches. Based on coefficient of variation (standard deviation / mean). A consistent player shows similar performance from match to match, reinforcing team confidence.
La consistance vient avec une bonne hygi: Consistency comes from good gaming habits: regular warmups, aim routines, and avoiding playing tilted. Focus on solid performances rather than flashes of brilliance.
Dégâts moyens infligés par round. Inclut: Average damage dealt per round. Includes grenade damage. ADR is a raw measure of offensive impact per round, independent of finishing the kill. A player with high ADR strongly contributes to round wins.
Pour augmenter l'ADR, apprends les lineu: To increase ADR, learn grenade lineups on every map and use HE and molotovs proactively. Seek contact with the enemy rather than playing passively.
Pourcentage de kills obtenus en headshot: Percentage of kills obtained as headshots. Reflects crosshair placement quality and aim in general. A high HS% means you aim at the head by default, shortening duels and improving your chances in trades.
Règle le crosshair à hauteur de tête en: Set your crosshair at head height permanently and move the mouse flat during rotations. Practice aim_botz / aim_redline maps 10 minutes before each session. A short-range AK spray should align on the head.
Part des rounds où tu réalises au moins: Share of rounds where you get at least 2 kills (doubles, triples, quads, aces). A powerful stat: unbalanced rounds are won in multi-kills. A player with a good ratio often turns 3v5 into 3v3 or even clutches.
Les multi-kills viennent d'un bon réset: Multi-kills come from a good position reset after the first kill: re-center the mouse, wallbang / pre-aim the likely second position before repositioning. Play spots with long sight lines to chain kills.
Nombre de situations 1vX gagnées sur les: Number of 1vX situations won over the last 20 matches (1v1, 1v2, 1v3, 1v4, 1v5). 1v1 and 1v2 are the most frequent; 1v3+ reveal the true clutcher. Each clutch is worth a whole round, often decisive on MR12.
Dans un 1vX, joue le temps : isole les a: In a 1vX, play the clock: isolate opponents, use sound, and take one duel at a time. Always keep a utility (flash, smoke) to shift attack angles. Never dry peek when you have the timer advantage.
Dégâts moyens infligés par round avec le: Average damage dealt per round with grenades (HE, molotovs, incendiaries). Measures the offensive value of your utility game. Good util damage comes from precise HEs, molos on obvious positions, and learned lineups.
Apprends 3 lineups de HE par map (une pa: Learn 3 HE lineups per map (one per bombsite + one for rotations). Throw molotovs systematically on opposing default positions instead of waiting for info. A well-placed grenade does 30 to 70 damage.
Nombre moyen de kills par match obtenus: Average kills per match obtained with the AWP (or Scout). Reveals if you are primary sniper, secondary or exclusive rifler. The AWPer profile requires mastered economy (save smart) and specific positioning: long sightlines, pick holes, info plays.
Travaille les peeks courts (0.3s) et les: Work on short peeks (0.3s) and quickscopes at the workshop (training_aim_csgo2). Learn listed peeks for each map (CT mid Dust2, A site long, banana Inferno). The AWP rewards discipline: never dry peek a spot where the enemy can be pre-aimed.
Comparaison des statistiques entre les c: Comparison of statistics between CT and T sides. Allows identifying strengths and weaknesses by side. A significant imbalance (over 15% win rate gap) may indicate a side-specific gameplay issue.
Si ton côté T est faible, travaille les: If your T side is weak, work on site entries and team coordination. If your CT side is weak, revisit your retake positions and anchor play. Analyze lost rounds to identify patterns.
Ces statistiques sont calculées automati: These statistics are calculated automatically on every demo analysis.
Plus tu analysés de matchs, plus tes sta: The more matches you analyze, the more accurate and representative your stats.
